title: Live duplicate-entry protection re-audit
objective: Verify from live DB, runtime state, and current logs that duplicate open positions for the same market_slug are actually prevented in the running stack right now.
acceptance_criteria: live DB path is explicitly identified
unique open-slug index presence is proven yes/no
current duplicate open row count is reported
runtime insert path is verified from current source
final outcome is VERIFIED or BLOCKED
rollback: Verification-only unless a hard failure is proven.
